title: Immunofluorescence HeLa cells
steps: Plate 1,8 x 10^5 HeLa cells on 12 mm coverslips.
Proceed to next step if not transfecting cells.
Transfect with indicated transfection reagent in DMEM media containing FBS and P/S.
Fix cells adding 8% paraformaldehyde directly into culture media in 1:1 ratio to obtain 4% final concentration of paraformaldehyde.
Wash coverslips 3X for 00:05:00 with PBS at Room temperature
Block and permeabilize cells in PBS/0.1% Saponin/3% BSA for at least 00:15:00 at Room temperature
Apply primary antibody diluted in PBS/0.1% Saponin/3%BSA and incubate 01:00:00 at Room temperature or Overnight at 4 °C .
Wash 3X for 00:05:00 with PBS/01% Saponin/3% BSA.
Apply Alexa Fluor secondary antibodies (1:600 from 1 mg/ml stock) diluted in PBS/0.1% Saponin/3% BSA for 01:00:00 at Room temperature in the dark.
Wash coverslips 3X for 00:05:00 at with PBS/01% Saponin/3% BSA.
Mount coverslips on microscope slides with Prolong Gold mounting medium.
Allow to dry o/n at Room temperature in the dark. Store at 4 °C
creator: Francesca Filippini
